Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Relates to the ordinary disability benefit for enhanced plan members of the New York city fire department pension fund
Summary: Provides an ordinary disability benefit for tier 3 enhanced plan members of the New York city fire department pension fund which is equivalent to the tier 2 benefit.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the retirement and social security law, in relation to the ordinary disability benefit for enhanced plan members of the New York city fire department pension fund
